---
title: "Charlotte Keble"
---

## Charlotte Keble

**Dates:** (1806/7-11 May 1866)

**Maiden name:** (Clarke)

### Description

wife of the Rev. John Keble

### Biography

She married (10 Oct 1835) the Rev. John Keble.

### Letters

- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from [May 1894]
- Letter from November 29. [1893?]
- Letter from Oct 22nd [1879?]
- Letter from July 9th 1877 
- Letter from [1 October 1870]
- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868
- Letter from January 22, 1868.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from All Saints’ Day [2 November], 1866.
- Letter from October 6, 1866.
- Letter from April 5. 1866.
- Letter from April 4th [1866]
- Letter from Easter Eve [31 March], 1866.
- Letter from Good Friday [30 March], 1866
- Letter from March 29, 1866.
- Letter from Holy Innocents [28? December], 1865.
- Letter from August 19, 1865.

*... and 28 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
